detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 餐飲英文 (English for Hospitality)	開課班級 : 應英一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 劉素勳	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Students will learn about English often used in restaurant business, including how to serve the customers or how to take orders (as the guests) in the restaurants. Also, how to introduce or talk about Chinese/ Taiwanese food in English through interactive communication or presentations in class. Intercultural knowledge will also be introduced and included in this course. Basically, it aims to provide the foundation and guidance needed for entering restaurant business in English.  


2.教學綱要
Conversation often used in restaurants; how to serve the customers or how to take orders in the restaurants. Also, how to introduce or talk about Chinese/ Taiwanese food in English

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Mid-term exam 25% 2. Final exam 25% 3. Conversation, report, presentation, quiz, class participation and attendance 50%  
1. 學生上課時需用心聽講，用心練習,做報告或繳交作業。 2. 學生最多可缺席(包含各類請假，公假及喪假除外) 6小時; 無故缺席超過6小時者，扣減平常分數。 3. 上課需準時出席，上課時需將手機關機。在上課時間內使用手機上網或講電話、傳簡訊等行為一經發現，平時成績(平均分)即扣一分。
